  "reasoning": "A civil war and the subsequent Rionegro Constitution deliberately dismantled central authority, creating a state with almost no power to project force or enforce its will. This radical federalism transferred power to regional caudillos and sovereign states, a fragmented but potent form of societal power that now completely dominated the national government.",
